name: Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 — Production Config (biased) on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 with production keyword-biasing config on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Canonical production baseline for tasks t0006–t0010.
model_description: nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3, Token-and-Duration Transducer, NeMo/Riva SDK, GPU inference, keyword biasing matching current production config

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
